_readme: Copy to <episode>/remotion-props/<locale>.json. Keys are composition IDs in packages/remotion-graphics (see its README for prop schemas). Text comes verbatim from script.<locale>.md — never retype from memory. durationSec is filled by tools/render-overlays.mjs from the beat's target_duration_sec, but can be preset here.

cta-card.line: 收藏好，买车那天照着看
